     the Fermi energy is    -0.7961 ev

!    total energy              =  -14765.56791690 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000003 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.19798695 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -14765.36992995 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -319693.67084631 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  161302.06877392 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -6092.49794294 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  149721.57350732 Ry
